Howling Cutlass  
 

Lore Item No Trade Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY SECONDARY
Skill: 1H Slashing Atk Delay: 19
DMG: 10 Dmg Bonus: 35
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
CHA: +4 INT: +4
Effect: Shrieking Howl (Combat, Casting Time: Instant) at Level 50
WT: 4.5 Size: MEDIUM
Class: WAR BRD ROG
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Rarity: Rare
Level to Attain: 58

What lvl does this proc at?
▲ Page top
what it does
QuoteReply
# Mar 10 2002 at 3:51 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592347778234
View User Forum
13 posts
the sword procs 120dd stun and pushes mob to the edge of your range and sometimes a little bit further ,on raid situations this weapon could be used to position a mob better or worse,a very interesting weapon in the hands of a smart melee.it can do a nice taunt,but imo willsappers,wavecrashers and the warrior 2h epic would all be far superior in taunting. if you want to know more about the weapon look for me on E'ci server as Kancer .
▲ Page top
proc is better than casting
QuoteReply
# Sep 22 2001 at 1:39 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591766507531
36 posts
A proc on this bad boy is better than a click effect. We all know that if you click something to cast a spell for you, and it isn't JBoots, that it takes FOREVER, while a proc is instantaneous. PERSONALLY, I prefer this as a proc, I wouldn't have to stop attacking to click it, which I would do while I cast the spell from the item. Just my 2cp, and I know, it ain't much.
▲ Page top
RE: proc is better than casting
QuoteReply
# Feb 02 2002 at 3:58 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592251080031
10 posts
why would you have to stop attacking to right click on it? I can melee and cast spells just fine.
▲ Page top
RE: proc is better than casting
QuoteReply
# Mar 05 2002 at 11:22 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591758352509
100 posts
notice you don't actually swing while casting
▲ Page top
RE: proc is better than casting
QuoteReply
# May 21 2002 at 12:32 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592759189111
22 posts
I do it all the time, bards can do it, don't think other classes can though.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Sep 14 2001 at 6:30 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Ok I get it they make it for bards and rogues so they can waste it right
RE: /drool
QuoteReply
# Sep 15 2001 at 2:31 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592758043846
3 posts
I do not think weapons are concidered a waste on bards because they have no double attack. And it is not wasted on off hand either. I have parsed raids and have seen some of my bard friends rate very high on the damage scale. In one case we were all shocked when one bard friend who does not have an epic rated higher than most of the tanks. He has a 11/17 pri and 12/24 sec. When I see him fight I see him dual swing almost every time(I counted 1 time in 20 his left hand didn't chop down). Add in his exceptional haste and he swings as fast as my epic monk. That is a fantastic damage potential even w/out dbl attack.

He would love this as a secondary weapon. It has a slightly better ratio then what he has now, similar bonus stats and adds a VERY nice TRIGGERED(or perhaps proc iff the trigger is listed wrong) effect. so without lowering his primary damage ratio he can raise his secondary and add a super proc. If he scored in the top 10 tanks before then this can only help keep him in that ranking.

Besides I don't think you can say any of those three classes would not want and love a high ratio weapon with a stun effect. To have an extra chance to stop a caster from gating or casting some nasty spell is desired by all and 120 DD is a nice bonus.

/bow
▲ Page top
sword
QuoteReply
# Sep 13 2001 at 8:28 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591759453984
1 post
i got one of it 2 weeks ago on Drinal

the effect is a 120 DD with stun how all says already, its also a knockbak of 2 feet or so.


when i won the sword all says the sword have a high agro and its better for a tank but i must diagree, the agro on the sword is very low and if a mob is on me i can still evade,

sword self looks like a defi. from keal



DoMo
lvl60 Rogue
Drinal - Winters Light

32 posts
DEX effects all procs, main OR offhand. is just that offhand doesnt proc as often as main would.

RE: Right-click Rogues
QuoteReply
# Sep 12 2001 at 10:57 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1593965790794
328 posts
I'm not saying you're wrong, but where do you see proc?...I see triggered, which means right-click.
▲ Page top
RE: Right-click Rogues
QuoteReply
# Sep 13 2001 at 3:07 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592248322158
282 posts
Seeing as how you've posted 208 times on this site so far, it seems you should know that it says a hell of a lot of effects are triggered that are really random. Hell, it says (unless it's been fixed) that the Selo's Song of Travel on some bard BPs was a permenant effect. That would mean permenant levitate, invisible, see invisible, & faster than sow. I'm not saying the effect on this cutlass is or isn't triggered, i'm just saying to take that part of item info here w/ a grain of salt.
▲ Page top
Spell Effect
QuoteReply
# Sep 12 2001 at 1:36 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591757464810
156 posts
Shrieking Howl
Stuns target for 4.0 (L1) seconds
Decrease Hit Points (HP) by 120 (L1)
Allowable Targets: All
Resistance Check: Magic

120 magic based damage and a 4 second stun sounds pretty nice. Keep this bugger on your main tank. Seems like it would generate some serious taunt with the stun.

Hmm, speaking of taunt, pair this in secondary with the newly posted Spear of Constriction in primary and your Tank will be snaring with one hand, stunning with the other. How's that for Taunt increasing procs?
▲ Page top
RE: Spell Effect
